channel.title: WP menu routes undefined
channel.description: I am following the Frontity Talks 2021-01 - Fetching menus from WordPress, but when my menu is loaded the links are undefined and content of the pages is not loaded. And after one click the links are dead. Any thoughts?

item.title: WP menu routes undefined
item.dc:creator: mancariemanuele
item.description:
Did u tryed using a normal <a> component?

Read full topic

item.title: WP menu routes undefined
item.dc:creator: s74
item.description:
Hello! Sorry, but it is on localhost so I can’t show it.

But it is the same code as in the tutorial, but without the mars-theme, just a blank theme.

When I did the same solution with mars-theme, it works straight away. So I guess there is something in the theme which is necessary for this tutorial/code to work.

Read full topic

item.title: WP menu routes undefined
item.dc:creator: santoshdevnath15
item.description:
Hi @s74, can you please show your code to fetch the menu, and also how you are using it?

Read full topic

item.title: WP menu routes undefined
item.dc:creator: s74
item.description:
I am following the Frontity Talks 2021-01 - Fetching menus from WordPress, but when my menu is loaded the links are undefined and content of the pages is not loaded. And after one click the links are dead.
Any thoughts?

Read full topic
